name: Verde Papas Con Chile Verde (Green Chile Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the shortening in a medium-sized skillet over medium heat. Add the sliced potatoes and cook until they are browned, about 5-7 minutes.
2. Add onions and seasonings (garlic salt and salt). Stir to combine and continue cooking for another 3-5 minutes, or until the onions are tender.
3. Add green chile and water. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and let it cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Varied amounts may be used
